name: pixelbisect
description: Local visual-regression forensics powered by Git bisect

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:compile && node --test --test-concurrency=1 .test-dist/test/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:unit: npm run build && npm run test:compile && node --test --test-concurrency=1 .test-dist/test/unit/*.test.js
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && npm run test:compile && node --test --test-concurrency=1 .test-dist/test/integration/*.test.js
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run test:compile && node --test --test-concurrency=1 .test-dist/test/e2e/*.test.js
scripts.demo: npm run build && node dist/cli.js install-browser && node dist/fixture/generate.js ./demo-fixture --force && node dist/cli.js run ./demo-fixture/pixelbisect.config.json
scripts.prepack: npm run clean && npm run build

author: Anas
